testcase.name: testExecutionService
testcase.system-out: pool-2-thread-1 processing record for anton@work.com,Anton Kuzmin,22 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for beata@mail.pl,Beata Nowak,23 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for cyril@tech.fr,Cyril Dupont,24 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for daria@pro.ru,Daria Morozova,25 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for erik@nord.se,Erik Larsson,26 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for fiona@web.ie,Fiona O'Brien,27 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for gleb@dev.by,Gleb Volkov,28 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for hanna@berlin.de,Hanna Schmidt,29 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for igor@cloud.ua,Igor Shevchenko,30 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for julia@it.es,Julia Garcia,31 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for karl@power.at,Karl Weber,32 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for lina@oslo.no,Lina Hansen,33 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for marc@paris.fr,Marc Bernard,34 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for nina@tokyo.jp,Nina Tanaka,35 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for oscar@london.uk,Oscar Wright,36 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for pavel@praha.cz,Pavel Novak,37 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for quentin@lux.lu,Quentin Meyer,38 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-3 processing record for rosa@roma.it,Rosa Rossi,39 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-1 processing record for stefan@sofia.bg,Stefan Ivanov,40 Result of operation : 0 pool-2-thread-2 processing record for tanya@helsinki.fi,Tanya Makinen,41 Result of operation : 0 Main execution over!
testcase.system-err:
Loading class `com.mysql.jdbc.Driver'. This is deprecated. The new driver class is `com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver'.
